series_metadata.series_description: Record series contains all policy statements and written procedures approved by the Board, or approved by the Executive Director pertaining to functions, activities, systems, personnel, directives of the Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper: retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced, then destroy. Machine readable copy will be maintained internally on Board server pursuant to this records retention schedule. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced,, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
